_note: Monero uses BLOCK-ENCODED base58 (8-byte blocks → 11 chars), NOT whole-payload. 69 bytes = 8 full blocks + 5-byte remainder → 95 chars mainnet. Keccak-256 checksum (first 4 bytes).
address_structure: 1-byte network + 32-byte spend pubkey + 32-byte view pubkey + 4-byte Keccak checksum = 69 bytes
